title: dicoma anomala subsp. attenuata
intro: Dicoma anomala subsp. attenuata is a plant species, also known as "Karee Bush", belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Dicoma anomala subsp. attenuata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, with some communities also using it in traditional rituals and ceremonies.
